summary: F2 appears fixed, but F1 is still not actually satisfied: the route does not send the classification hint in the gateway’s accepted shape, so the gateway will ignore it and re-classify the turn.

findings.title: Classification hint is sent in the wrong JSON shape, so the gateway ignores it
findings.recommendation: Wrap the routing hint under `classification`, e.g. `{ message: prompt, classification: { taskType: classification.taskType, tier: classification.tier } }`. The current gateway handlers read `body.classification` in both PTY and souls mode; top-level `taskType`/`tier` is not consumed, so the route is not binding and F1 is not actually resolved.
